assertions.title: Production build CSP does not contain unsafe-eval

steps.observed: Build completed with exit code 0 in 11859ms
Returns 0, exit code 1 (grep found no matches)

steps.action: Inspect CSP meta tag in dist/index.html
steps.observed: script-src 'self' — no unsafe-eval present. Full CSP: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https://img.youtube.com data:; connect-src 'self';

evidence.cspContent: Content-Security-Policy content="default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https://img.youtube.com data:; connect-src 'self';"

steps.expected: Handler validates data size before processing
steps.observed: Handler defines MAX_EXPORT_SIZE = 5 * 1024 * 1024 (5MB), computes dataSize via Buffer.byteLength(JSON.stringify(exportData), 'utf8'), and returns { success: false, error: '...' } when dataSize > MAX_EXPORT_SIZE

steps.action: Verify error response format on oversized data
steps.observed: Returns { success: false, error: `Export data too large: ${(dataSize / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(2)}MB exceeds 5MB limit` }

steps.action: Verify normal export path for data under 5MB
steps.expected: Handler proceeds to save dialog and file write
steps.observed: Code after size check shows save dialog and fs.promises.writeFile for valid-sized data

evidence.sizeValidationCode: const MAX_EXPORT_SIZE = 5 * 1024 * 1024; const dataSize = Buffer.byteLength(JSON.stringify(exportData), 'utf8'); if (dataSize > MAX_EXPORT_SIZE) { return { success: false, error: `Export data too large: ${(dataSize / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(2)}MB exceeds 5MB limit` }; }
evidence.note: Could not run live IPC test (Electron app not launched) — verified via source code inspection of the IPC handler

assertions.title: Unused Vite dependencies removed from package.json

steps.observed: Returns no matches (exit code 1 — grep found nothing)
webpack 5.102.1 compiled successfully in 11859 ms, exit code 0

steps.action: Verify package.json devDependencies for vite, electron-vite, @vitejs/plugin-react
steps.observed: None present — devDependencies contains webpack, webpack-cli, webpack-dev-server, html-webpack-plugin but no vite packages

evidence.buildTool: Project uses webpack (not vite) as bundler — webpack, webpack-cli, webpack-dev-server present in devDependencies

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-CSP-001 confirmed no unsafe-eval in production CSP. VAL-CSP-002 confirmed size validation in export-progress-backup IPC handler (source code review). VAL-CSP-003 confirmed no vite dependencies in package.json and build still succeeds.
